title: Used module read from BLIF removed during synth_ice40
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Given files top.v and ssdec.blif (in [top_ssdec.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/4232751/top_ssdec.zip)), we are trying to use synthesize a design using the top module from top.v, which instantiates a module ssdec from ssdec.blif.  To do this, we run the command:

`yosys -p "read_blif ssdec.blif; read_verilog top.v; synth_ice40 -top top; write_verilog struct_top.v"`

ssdec.blif was generated using yosys by performing the following on ssdec.v:

`yosys -p "read_verilog ssdec.v; synth_ice40 -blif ssdec.blif"`

## Expected behavior

In struct_top.v, I expect to see some form of the mux logic I implemented in ssdec.v with its output connected to ss0.

## Actual behavior

In the resulting [struct_top.v](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/4232786/struct_top.zip), there is no port connection to ss0, which was connected as an output to the ssdec module in the top module, but in the struct_top.v file, ss0 is not assigned to any port.

My yosys version is 0.9+932 (git sha1 3c6a566d, gcc 6.3.0-18+deb9u1 -fPIC -Os).
